title: selaginella tanyclada
intro: Selaginella tanyclada, also known as the spiny resurrection fern or false maidenhair, is a species of evergreen plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Selaginella tanyclada include its ability to reduce stress, improve respiratory health, and protect against oxidative damage. Selaginella tanyclada can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
